prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock I6-6.7L Cummins (engine code: ISB 6.7) turbo with a BorgWarner S400SX-E 83mm turbocharger, featuring a billet compressor wheel and a 1.32 A/R turbine housing for optimized spool and 700+ wheel horsepower capability. Pair with a Fleece Performance Engineering (FPE) Cummins Triple Disc Converter to handle the increased torque without slippage.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a S&S Diesel Motorsport 12mm CP3 injection pump (part #SS12CP3) with a 200% overdrive gear set, coupled with 100hp Bosch CR injectors (part #0445120371) and a FASS 150GPH Titanium Signature Series lift pump to ensure consistent fuel delivery under extreme boost.

Exhaust: Install a 5-inch MBRP S6090AL 409 stainless steel turbo-back exhaust system with a 3-inch downpipe and a custom 4-inch v-band clamp connection to the BorgWarner turbo, reducing backpressure by 40% and improving turbo response. Pair with a Banks Monster Race exhaust brake for enhanced towing control.
estetica: Body Kit: Fit a RAM 3500-specific Dually Fender Flare Kit by Ranch Hand (part #RH-FF3500) with 6-inch wide fiberglass flares, paired with a Recon LED light bar (part #REC-50IN-10K) integrated into a custom fabricated aluminum front bumper with a 2.5-inch winch mount for a 16,500 lb Warn Zeon 12-S.

Suspension: Install a Carli Suspension 4.5-inch Dominator Stage 5 system with Fox 2.5 Factory Series DSC coilovers (part #985-24-112) and a rear Carli 4-link suspension kit with adjustable Heim joint links for precise axle control. Pair with a Hellwig 11,500 lb Big Wig rear sway bar (part #7711) to reduce body roll during high-speed towing.

Wheels/Tires: Mount a set of 20x12 Fuel Trophy Wheels (part #D645) with a -44mm offset, wrapped in 42-inch Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tires (325/60R20) for a 3-inch lift. Use Icon Vehicle Dynamics 1.5-inch wheel spacers (part #20-150) to achieve a 100mm track width increase for improved stability.
